calendar.matters:
MOTION TO AMEND The Judgment To Include Anne J. Payne, As Trustee Under Declaration Of Trust, Dated April 17, 1997, As An Additional Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar Jun-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Schulman, Esq. (818-999-5553) for Judgment Creditor NDS, LLC through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: ASSIGNEE NDS, LLC'S MOTION TO AMEND The Judgment To Include Anne J. Payne, As Trustee Under Declaration Of Trust, Dated April 17, 1997, As An Additional Judgment Debtor is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order is signed. Moving party to prepare an Amended Judgment. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
